category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Vietnam market (TCVN voluntary standards and QCVN national technical regulations enforced via the CR conformity mark).

title.en: China-to-Vietnam LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Vietnam requirements: QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN mandatory technical regulation enforced with the CR conformity mark, TCVN IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 standards, MOIT energy labelling and MEPS, MIC type approval for smart luminaires, and Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT RoHS-like restrictions versus Chinese GB / GB/T standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与越南要求差距对照：QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 强制性技术法规（以 CR 合格标志强制执行）、TCVN IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 标准、工贸部（MOIT）能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）、智能灯具的信息通信部（MIC）型号核准，以及第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知的类 RoHS 限制，并与中国 GB / GB/T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與越南要求差距對照：QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 強制性技術法規（以 CR 合格標誌強制執行）、TCVN IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 標準、工貿部（MOIT）能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）、智能燈具的信息通信部（MIC）型號核准，以及第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知的類 RoHS 限制，並與中國 GB / GB/T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Vietnam law, QCVN technical regulations, TCVN standards, MOIT energy labelling and MEPS thresholds, MIC type-approval scope, and Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT restricted-substance and e-waste take-back obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行越南法律、QCVN 技术法规、TCVN 标准、工贸部能效标签及 MEPS 阈值、信息通信部型号核准范围，以及第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知的限用物质及电子废弃物回收义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行越南法律、QCVN 技術法規、TCVN 標準、工貿部能效標籤及 MEPS 閾值、信息通信部型號核准範圍，以及第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知的限用物質及電子廢棄物回收義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Vietnam must obtain certification of conformity to QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN (the mandatory national technical regulation for lighting equipment EMC and safety) and affix the CR conformity mark via a designated certification body before customs clearance; test and document conformity to the relevant TCVN IEC standards (TCVN IEC 60598 for luminaire safety, TCVN IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, TCVN IEC 62471 for photobiological safety); meet MOIT minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and apply the Vietnam MOIT energy label after MOIT registration; obtain MIC type approval and conformity for any luminaire with integrated radio/wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee); observe Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT RoHS-like restrictions on hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment and the Decision 16/2015/QD-TTg producer take-back obligation for end-of-life products; and act through an in-country importer that bears registration and labelling responsibility — none of which is covered by existing Chinese CCC certification or GB standards alone.
answer_first.zh: 向越南出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：在清关前取得对 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN（照明设备电磁兼容与安全的强制性国家技术法规）的合格认证，并经指定认证机构加施 CR 合格标志；检测并记录对相关 TCVN IEC 标准的符合性（灯具安全 TCVN IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯 TCVN IEC 62560、光生物安全 TCVN IEC 62471）；满足工贸部（MOIT）最低能效标准（MEPS），并在 MOIT 注册后加施越南 MOIT 能效标签；对集成无线电/无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee）的灯具取得信息通信部（MIC）型号核准及合格认证；遵守第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知对电气电子设备有害物质的类 RoHS 限制，以及第 16/2015/QD-TTg 号决定对报废产品的生产者回收义务；并通过承担注册及标签责任的境内进口商进行操作——上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 标准本身所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向越南出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：在清關前取得對 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN（照明設備電磁兼容與安全的強制性國家技術法規）的合格認證，並經指定認證機構加施 CR 合格標誌；檢測並記錄對相關 TCVN IEC 標準的符合性（燈具安全 TCVN IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈 TCVN IEC 62560、光生物安全 TCVN IEC 62471）；滿足工貿部（MOIT）最低能效標準（MEPS），並在 MOIT 注冊後加施越南 MOIT 能效標籤；對集成無線電/無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee）的燈具取得信息通信部（MIC）型號核准及合格認證；遵守第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知對電氣電子設備有害物質的類 RoHS 限制，以及第 16/2015/QD-TTg 號決定對報廢產品的生產者回收義務；並通過承擔注冊及標籤責任的境內進口商進行操作——上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 標準本身所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon any amendment to QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN, MOIT MEPS thresholds, or Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT restricted-substance scope.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. QCVN/TCVN references, MOIT MEPS thresholds, and Circular 30/2011 restricted-substance lists must be re-verified against the current official Vietnam sources on each review cycle.
